themeManager.title: Desktop Theme Configurator
themeManager.description: Select from the skeuomorphic engine theme presets to apply native visual composites globally.
themeManager.warningText: Applying the experimental Corrupt / Shattered theme can cause signal phase glitches, interrupt thread loops, and spawn pixel wreckage. Perform drill under authorized clearance only.
themeManager.successMsg: Global theme updated successfully. System composites reset.
